description: Responsum sent by Rav Sherira Gaon, head of the Pumbedita Jewish Academy in Baghdad, to Masīla (in modern Algeria). Dating (text): late 10th–early 11th century, based on the years of activity of Rav Sherira Gaon; this copy probably later. Concerns a dispute over the validity a marriage contract arranged by the mother of a young girl during her husband's absence from Masīla. (Information from Stampfer)
description_he: שאלה משפטית בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
